```{r R/NR T10 Beta diversity, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  labs(x = "", y = "Beta diversity<br><span style='font-size:20pt;'>(Bray-Curtis, Relative value)</span>") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("NR" = "Non-Responder", "R" = "Responder")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("NR" = "#800080", "R" = "#008000")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 25), legend.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(color = "black"), legend.position = "none", , axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 30, color = "black")) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.format", comparisons = list(c("R", "NR")), vjust = -0.2, size = 6)

ggsave("FigS6C.pdf", device = "pdf", height = 6, width = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### Flagellin

Pairwise comparion of flagellin at T10. This recreates Fig. S6D:

```{r R/NR T10 TLR5, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(multivariate_D10_all %>% filter(Group == "Probiotics"), aes(x = Responder, y = Flagellin, color = Responder)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(x = "", y = "Flagellin<br><span style='font-size:20pt;'>(Relative value)</span>") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("NR" = "Non-Responder", "R" = "Responder")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("NR" = "#800080", "R" = "#008000")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 25), legend.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(color = "black"), legend.position = "none", , axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 30, color = "black")) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.format", comparisons = list(c("R", "NR")), vjust = -0.2, size = 6)

ggsave("FigS6D.pdf", device = "pdf", height = 6, width = 6, dpi = 300)
```

### LPS

Pairwise comparion of LPS at T10. This recreates Fig. S6E:

```{r R/NR T10 TLR4, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
ggplot(multivariate_D10_all %>% filter(Group == "Probiotics"), aes(x = Responder, y = LPS, color = Responder)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  labs(x = "", y = "LPS<br><span style='font-size:20pt;'>(Relative value)</span>") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("NR" = "Non-Responder", "R" = "Responder")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("NR" = "#800080", "R" = "#008000")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.15)) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 25), legend.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_text(color = "black"), legend.position = "none", , axis.title.y = ggtext::element_markdown(size = 30, color = "black")) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", label = "p.format", comparisons = list(c("R", "NR")), vjust = -0.2, size = 6)

ggsave("FigS6E.pdf", device = "pdf", height = 6, width = 6, dpi = 300)
```

# ROC Curves

## Control

ROC curve for control chambers. This recreates Fig. 6D:

```{r ROC R/NR Control, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Resampling loop: stratified split + RF + ROCR
for (b in 1:B) {
  
  # ---- STRATIFIED Split: ~pct_val% per class in validation ----
  idx_val <- unlist(tapply(seq_len(nrow(multivariate_D10_ROC_control_clean)), multivariate_D10_ROC_control_clean$outcome, function(idx) {
    k <- max(1, round(length(idx) * pct_val / 100))   # at least 1 per validation class
    sample(idx, size = k)
  }))
  
  validation <- multivariate_D10_ROC_control_clean[idx_val, , drop = FALSE]
  training   <- multivariate_D10_ROC_control_clean[-idx_val, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # ---- Empty levels drop (safety ----
  training$outcome   <- droplevels(training$outcome)
  validation$outcome <- droplevels(validation$outcome)
  
  # ---- Safety: if a class is missing from training, we skip it ----
  if (nlevels(training$outcome) < length(classes)) next
  
  # ---- Random Forest ----
  rf_classifier <- randomForest(outcome ~ ., data = training, ntree = ntree, importance = TRUE)
  
  # ---- Probabilities by class ----
  prediction_ROC <- predict(rf_classifier, validation[, -1, drop = FALSE], type = "prob")
  
  # ---- ROCR : one-vs-rest per class + interpolation ----
  for (i in seq_along(classes)) {
    cls <- classes[i]
    
    # If the model doesn't have the column (which is possible if the class is missing from the training data), we skip it
    if (!(cls %in% colnames(prediction_ROC))) next
    
    labels <- factor(ifelse(validation$outcome == cls, "pos", "neg"),
                     levels = c("neg", "pos"))
    scores <- as.numeric(prediction_ROC[, cls])
    
    ok <- !is.na(labels) & !is.na(scores)
    labels2 <- labels[ok]
    scores2 <- scores[ok]
    
    # If there are no positive or negative results in the validation for this class, ROC analysis is not possible
    if (length(unique(labels2)) < 2) next
    
    pred <- ROCR::prediction(scores2, labels2)
    perf <- ROCR::performance(pred, "tpr", "fpr")
    
    fpr <- perf@x.values[[1]]
    tpr <- perf@y.values[[1]]
    
    # sorted / unique points
    o <- order(fpr)
    fpr <- fpr[o]; tpr <- tpr[o]
    keep <- !duplicated(fpr)
    fpr <- fpr[keep]; tpr <- tpr[keep]
    
    # Interpolation on the common grid
    tpr_interp <- approx(x = fpr, y = tpr, xout = fpr_grid, rule = 2, ties = "ordered")$y
    tpr_mat_list[[cls]][, b] <- tpr_interp
    
    # AUC
    auc.perf <- ROCR::performance(pred, "auc")
    auc_mat[cls, b] <- auc.perf@y.values[[1]]
  }
}

# Summary: mean ± SD (based on B repetitions)
roc_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(classes, function(cls) {
  mat <- tpr_mat_list[[cls]]
  
  mean_tpr <- rowMeans(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_tpr   <- apply(mat, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    fpr = fpr_grid,
    mean = mean_tpr,
    lower = pmax(0, mean_tpr - sd_tpr),
    upper = pmin(1, mean_tpr + sd_tpr),
    class = cls
  )
}))

# Plot of mean ROC curve + bands representing standard deviation
pdf(file = "Fig6D.pdf", height = 6, width = 6)
colors <- c("#008000", "#800080")   # 4 classes

par(mfrow = c(1, 1), cex = 1.2)
plot(c(0, 1), c(0, 1), type = "n",
     xlab = "False Positive Rate (FPR)", ylab = "True Positive Rate (TPR)",
     main = "")

for (i in seq_along(classes)) {
  cls <- classes[i]
  df <- roc_summary[roc_summary$class == cls, ]
  
  polygon(
    x = c(df$fpr, rev(df$fpr)),
    y = c(df$lower, rev(df$upper)),
    col = adjustcolor(colors[i], alpha.f = 0.2),
    border = NA)
  lines(df$fpr, df$mean, col = colors[i], lwd = 2)}

abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Legend: AUC mean ± SD (based on B repetitions)
auc_mean <- apply(auc_mat, 1, function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
auc_sd   <- apply(auc_mat, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))

legend_labels <- sapply(seq_along(classes), function(i) {
  cls <- classes[i]
  sprintf("%s (AUC = %.3f ± %.3f)", cls, auc_mean[cls], auc_sd[cls])
})

legend("bottomright", legend = legend_labels, col = colors[seq_along(classes)], lwd = 2, bty = "n", cex = 1.1)

dev.off()

# classifier
varImpPlot(rf_classifier)
print(rf_classifier[["importance"]])
```

## Probiotics

ROC curve for probiotic-treated chambers. This recreates Fig. 6E:

```{r ROC R/NR Probiotics, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Resampling loop: stratified split + RF + ROCR
for (b in 1:B) {
  
  # ---- STRATIFIED Split: ~pct_val% per class in validation ----
  idx_val <- unlist(tapply(seq_len(nrow(multivariate_D10_ROC_probiotics_clean)), multivariate_D10_ROC_probiotics_clean$outcome, function(idx) {
    k <- max(1, round(length(idx) * pct_val / 100))   # at least 1 per validation class
    sample(idx, size = k)
  }))
  
  validation <- multivariate_D10_ROC_probiotics_clean[idx_val, , drop = FALSE]
  training   <- multivariate_D10_ROC_probiotics_clean[-idx_val, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # ---- Empty levels drop (safety ----
  training$outcome   <- droplevels(training$outcome)
  validation$outcome <- droplevels(validation$outcome)
  
  # ---- Safety: if a class is missing from training, we skip it ----
  if (nlevels(training$outcome) < length(classes)) next
  
  # ---- Random Forest ----
  rf_classifier <- randomForest(outcome ~ ., data = training, ntree = ntree, importance = TRUE)
  
  # ---- Probabilities by class ----
  prediction_ROC <- predict(rf_classifier, validation[, -1, drop = FALSE], type = "prob")
  
  # ---- ROCR : one-vs-rest per class + interpolation ----
  for (i in seq_along(classes)) {
    cls <- classes[i]
    
    # If the model doesn't have the column (which is possible if the class is missing from the training data), we skip it
    if (!(cls %in% colnames(prediction_ROC))) next
    
    labels <- factor(ifelse(validation$outcome == cls, "pos", "neg"),
                     levels = c("neg", "pos"))
    scores <- as.numeric(prediction_ROC[, cls])
    
    ok <- !is.na(labels) & !is.na(scores)
    labels2 <- labels[ok]
    scores2 <- scores[ok]
    
    # If there are no positive or negative results in the validation for this class, ROC analysis is not possible
    if (length(unique(labels2)) < 2) next
    
    pred <- ROCR::prediction(scores2, labels2)
    perf <- ROCR::performance(pred, "tpr", "fpr")
    
    fpr <- perf@x.values[[1]]
    tpr <- perf@y.values[[1]]
    
    # sorted / unique points
    o <- order(fpr)
    fpr <- fpr[o]; tpr <- tpr[o]
    keep <- !duplicated(fpr)
    fpr <- fpr[keep]; tpr <- tpr[keep]
    
    # Interpolation on the common grid
    tpr_interp <- approx(x = fpr, y = tpr, xout = fpr_grid, rule = 2, ties = "ordered")$y
    tpr_mat_list[[cls]][, b] <- tpr_interp
    
    # AUC
    auc.perf <- ROCR::performance(pred, "auc")
    auc_mat[cls, b] <- auc.perf@y.values[[1]]
  }
}

# Summary: mean ± SD (based on B repetitions)
roc_summary <- do.call(rbind, lapply(classes, function(cls) {
  mat <- tpr_mat_list[[cls]]
  
  mean_tpr <- rowMeans(mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  sd_tpr   <- apply(mat, 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  data.frame(
    fpr = fpr_grid,
    mean = mean_tpr,
    lower = pmax(0, mean_tpr - sd_tpr),
    upper = pmin(1, mean_tpr + sd_tpr),
    class = cls
  )
}))

# Plot of mean ROC curve + bands representing standard deviation
pdf(file = "Fig6E.pdf", height = 6, width = 6)
colors <- c("#008000", "#800080")  # 4 classes

par(mfrow = c(1, 1), cex = 1.2)
plot(c(0, 1), c(0, 1), type = "n",
     xlab = "False Positive Rate (FPR)", ylab = "True Positive Rate (TPR)",
     main = "")

for (i in seq_along(classes)) {
  cls <- classes[i]
  df <- roc_summary[roc_summary$class == cls, ]
  
  polygon(
    x = c(df$fpr, rev(df$fpr)),
    y = c(df$lower, rev(df$upper)),
    col = adjustcolor(colors[i], alpha.f = 0.2),
    border = NA)
  lines(df$fpr, df$mean, col = colors[i], lwd = 2)}

abline(0, 1, lty = 2)

# Legend: AUC mean ± SD (based on B repetitions)
auc_mean <- apply(auc_mat, 1, function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE))
auc_sd   <- apply(auc_mat, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE))

legend_labels <- sapply(seq_along(classes), function(i) {
  cls <- classes[i]
  sprintf("%s (AUC = %.3f ± %.3f)", cls, auc_mean[cls], auc_sd[cls])
})

legend("bottomright", legend = legend_labels, col = colors[seq_along(classes)], lwd = 2, bty = "n", cex = 1.1)

dev.off()

# classifier
varImpPlot(rf_classifier)
print(rf_classifier[["importance"]])
```
